query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(630005, 'Which epistle is considered Paul''s theological masterpiece?', 'multiple_choice', '["Romans", "Galatians", "Ephesians", "Colossians"]', 'Romans', 1),
(630005, 'According to Romans 1:16-17, the Gospel is God''s power for what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Salvation", "Judgment", "Healing", "Prosperity"]', 'Salvation', 2),
(630005, 'What does Romans 3:23 teach about humanity?', 'multiple_choice', '["All have sinned and fall short of God''s glory", "Some are righteous by nature", "Sin affects only unbelievers", "Humanity is basically good"]', 'All have sinned and fall short of God''s glory', 3),
(630005, 'Why did Paul write 1 Corinthians?', 'multiple_choice', '["To address problems reported about the church", "To introduce himself before visiting", "To thank them for their support", "To appoint church leaders"]', 'To address problems reported about the church', 4),
(630005, 'What chapter in 1 Corinthians is known as the "love chapter"?', 'multiple_choice', '["Chapter 13", "Chapter 12", "Chapter 15", "Chapter 1"]', 'Chapter 13', 5),
(630005, 'What major doctrine does 1 Corinthians 15 address?', 'multiple_choice', '["The resurrection", "Spiritual gifts", "Church discipline", "Marriage"]', 'The resurrection', 6),
(630005, 'What is 2 Corinthians characterized as?', 'multiple_choice', '["Paul''s most personal and emotional letter", "Paul''s most theological letter", "Paul''s shortest letter", "Paul''s final letter"]', 'Paul''s most personal and emotional letter', 7),
(630005, 'According to 2 Corinthians 12:9, what did God tell Paul about His grace?', 'multiple_choice', '["My grace is sufficient for you", "My grace will make you wealthy", "My grace removes all suffering", "My grace is earned through works"]', 'My grace is sufficient for you', 8),
(630005, 'What does Paul defend in 2 Corinthians?', 'multiple_choice', '["His apostolic authority", "The Mosaic Law", "Circumcision", "Temple worship"]', 'His apostolic authority', 9),
(630005, 'What collection did Paul encourage in 2 Corinthians?', 'multiple_choice', '["The Jerusalem collection", "The Corinthian collection", "The Roman collection", "The Galatian collection"]', 'The Jerusalem collection', 10),
(630005, 'Explain Paul''s doctrine of justification by faith as presented in Romans and its significance for Christian theology.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Justification by faith means sinners are declared righteous before God through faith in Christ, not by works of the law, demonstrating salvation is by grace alone.', 11);
command:

(630005, 'According to 2 Corinthians 12:9, what did God tell Paul about His grace?', 'multiple_choice', '["My grace is sufficient for you", "My grace will make you wealthy", "My grace removes all suffering", "My grace is earned through works"]', 'My grace is sufficient for you', 8),
